programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Quiet On Set: The Dark Side Of Kids Tv
programme.desc: (M) A former child star reveals how he survived abuse at the hands of his acting coach. The harrowing account traces the challenges faced when the actor sought out police.
